info.description: Slot scheduling and booking system for KBTU counseling platform.
info.title: KBTU Psychologist Booking Service API

get.description: Allows admin to see all booked slots across the platform.

post.description: Allows admin to cancel any booking, even if they aren't the psychologist or student.

get.description: Returns global stats for the admin dashboard, including top psychologist.
Admin views unmasked ratings and reviews across the platform, including student and psychologist identities.
Psychologist views their ratings and written reviews. Student identities and exact dates are anonymized to protect privacy.
Returns all slots for the logged-in psychologist, including student details for booked slots.

parameters.description: Start date for filter (YYYY-MM-DD), default: today
parameters.name: date

post.description: Psychologist generates multiple slots based on a weekly schedule pattern between start_date and end_date.
post.summary: Create schedule slots for a psychologist

400.description: validation error or no slots created

delete.description: Allows a psychologist to remove an available slot from their schedule. Fails if the slot is already booked.

403.description: Not authorized or not the owner

post.description: Psychologist cancels a session. Frees the slot and triggers a cancellation email to the student.

put.description: Psychologist writes private notes after a session. Hidden from the student.
put.summary: Add private notes to a session

put.description: Psychologist writes post-session recommendations. This is visible to the student and triggers an email notification.

parameters.description: Slot ID (UUID of the completed session)
parameters.name: id

200.description: Recommendations successfully saved and student notified

403.description: Not authorized or not the owner of this session

get.description: Returns meaningful KPIs: Load, Ratings, Trends, and efficiency.
Psychologist views all past sessions and private notes for a specific student.
Returns free slots for a given psychologist and date, enriched with psychologist name via gRPC.
get.summary: Get available slots for a specific date

get.description: Returns dates within the specified month where the psychologist has at least one free slot.
get.summary: Get calendar days with available slots

get.description: Returns a list of all upcoming and past appointments booked by the logged-in student.

post.description: Student books a specific slot. Uses optimistic locking on the version field to avoid double-booking.
post.summary: Book a slot as a student

409.description: slot already booked or just booked

post.description: Student cancels their own booking. This resets the slot to 'available' and notifies the waitlist.

403.description: Not authorized or not the owner

post.description: Finalizes the reservation by submitting the questionnaire and student's phone number. Requires a previous 'reserve' action.

403.description: Not authorized or no active reservation

post.description: Student leaves a 1-5 star rating and an optional review for a completed appointment.

400.description: Invalid rating (must be 1-5) or session not finished

post.description: Student moves their booking from one slot to another available slot atomically. Alerts waitlist for the old slot.

parameters.description: Old Slot ID (The one currently booked)
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: The new Slot ID to move to
parameters.name: request

400.description: Invalid request body or same slot IDs

403.description: Not authorized or not the owner

409.description: New slot already booked or race condition

post.description: Student books a specific slot. Uses optimistic locking on the version field to avoid double-booking.
post.summary: Book a slot as a student

409.description: slot already booked or just booked

get.description: Student sees all the dates and psychologists they are waiting for.

post.description: Student joins a waitlist for a specific psychologist on a specific date.

delete.description: Student removes themselves from a specific waitlist entry.

reason.example: Schedule conflict with my midterm exam
